name: Mel's Salsas
recipeInstructions:
1. SALSA FRESCA (fresh salsa):
- 2 large ripe tomatoes, peeled and diced
- 1/2 large sweet onion, diced
- 1 or 2 small hot peppers (serrano, jalapeno, or arbol), finely diced
- Juice from 1/2 key lime/lime/or lemon
- 1/2 cup cilantro, diced
- Salt to taste
2. Mix all the above ingredients together and use as you would any salsa.
3. CHIPOTLE SALSA:
- 2 large ripe tomatoes (simmer in a small amount of water for 3-4 minutes)
- 1 or 2 chipotle peppers from a can, peeled
- A little of the sauce (if desired for more heat)
- Salt to taste
4. Blend all ingredients for about 6-7 seconds.
5. SALSA:
- On a stove, grill, or non-stick griddle at high heat, lightly char:
- 2 large very ripe tomatoes
- 2 garlic cloves
- 1 or 2 small hot peppers (chile verde, jalapeno, serrano, arbol)
- Let the tomatoes cool slightly and peel.
- Meanwhile, mash ingredients in a molcajete or mortar & pestle:
- Peel remaining tomato
- Add diced sweet onion and cilantro
- Salt to taste.
6. SALSA YUCATECA:
- 1 habanero chili, charred as above and mashed
- Juice from 1 key lime/lime
- 2 tablespoons olive oil
- 1 garlic clove, roasted and mashed
- Salt to taste
7. Place all ingredients in a small dish or bowl and mix together. Try this in chicken soup!
- When roasting garlic, keep the peel on until done. Remove after roasting!
